title: Best hardwood floor vacuums | Bin Diving
description: AI-dug recommendations for best hardwood floor vacuums. Compare options and find one that fits.

recommendations.product_name: Miele Complete C2 Hardfloor Canister Vacuum
cons: Canister model less convenient than cordless
Higher upfront cost than budget upright models

recommendations.product_name: Dyson V12 / V15 (Fluffy Optic / Detect models) Cordless Stick
pros: Laser/dust-detect tech reveals fine dust on hard floors
Soft Fluffy brushroll protects and picks up fine debris
Lightweight and easy to maneuver for sealed hardwood
cons: Battery life limits long sessions without recharge

recommendations.product_name: Shark APEX / DuoClean Upright (e.g., APEX Duoclean)
pros: DuoClean head transitions well between hardwood and rugs
Strong debris pickup on hard floors
cons: Some owners report brush/roller maintenance issues
Upright size less maneuverable in tight spaces
